# Carnation

[![](https://bioconductor.org/shields/availability/devel/carnation.svg)](https://bioconductor.org/packages/devel/bioc/html/carnation.html#archives)
[![](https://bioconductor.org/shields/lastcommit/devel/bioc/carnation.svg)](https://bioconductor.org/checkResults/devel/bioc-LATEST/carnation/)
[![](https://bioconductor.org/shields/build/devel/bioc/carnation.svg)](https://bioconductor.org/checkResults/devel/bioc-LATEST/carnation/)
[![](https://bioconductor.org/shields/years-in-bioc/carnation.svg)](https://bioconductor.org/packages/devel/bioc/html/carnation.html#since)

**Less Code, More Biology: Carnation for Collaborative Multi-Omics
Exploration**

Carnation is a modular, interactive Shiny app for working with bulk
RNA-seq and related omics data across differential expression (DE),
functional enrichment, and gene pattern analysis. It’s designed for
experiments with many contrasts and iterative tuning, where results are
otherwise scattered across scripts and output files, and can be used to
compare signals across modalities (e.g. transcriptomics and proteomics).

A range of interactive visualizations are available, including PCA, MA
plots, UpSet plots, heatmaps, customizable gene-level views, and
multiple enrichment summaries. Also, a global gene scratchpad lets you
track genes of interest across all modules.

Carnation supports multiple projects and user access control, and can be
run locally or deployed on a central server for sharing analyses with
collaborators. Its modular design makes it easy to extend with new
tools, visualizations, or data types. In summary, Carnation democratizes
multi-omic genomics analyses, transforming static analysis into a
collaborative, interactive experience, enabling research teams to spend
less time navigating data and more time generating biological insight.

**Carnation is now on Bioconductor devel (Official release: April
2026)**

Check out the official bioconductor page
[here](https://bioconductor.org/packages/devel/bioc/html/carnation.html)
for more details.

## Key Features

- **DE Analysis**: Analyze differential expression through multiple
  visualizations
  - **Summary**: Get a quick overview of your differential expression
    results
  - **Metadata**: Explore sample metadata and experimental design
  - **PCA Plot**: Visualize sample relationships with gene loadings
    overlay
  - **Scatter Plot**: Compare fold-changes for genes between different
    comparisons
  - **MA Plot**: Identify differentially expressed genes with
    statistical significance
  - **Gene Plot**: Create customizable expression visualizations for
    genes of interest
  - **UpSet Plot**: Discover overlapping gene sets across multiple
    comparisons
  - **Heatmap**: Examine expression patterns across samples and
    conditions
- **Functional Enrichment**: Understand the biological significance of
  your results
  - **Table**: Interactive tables with powerful search capabilities
  - **Plots**: Seven different visualizations including network plots
    and dendrograms
  - **Compare Results**: Directly compare enrichment results between
    conditions
- **Pattern Analysis**: Identify co-regulated gene clusters across
  conditions
  - **Plot**: Visualize expression patterns of gene clusters
  - **Cluster Membership**: Explore which genes belong to which clusters
- **Gene Scratchpad**: Track genes of interest across all visualizations
- **Flexible Deployment**: Run locally for personal analysis or on a
  server to share with collaborators
- **User Management**: Optional authentication system for controlled
  access in multi-user environments

## Installation

Carnation can be installed using
[`BiocManager::install`](https://bioconductor.github.io/BiocManager/reference/install.html).
First, start R (version: 4.6) and then run:

``` r

# first check to see if BiocManager is available
if(!requireNamespace('BiocManager', quietly=TRUE)){
  install.packages('BiocManager')
}

BiocManager::install('carnation')
```

To install the ‘devel’ version

``` r

BiocManager::install('carnation', version='devel')
```

### remotes

You can install the developmental version of carnation from github using
the `remotes` package:

``` r

install.packages('remotes')
remotes::install_github('NICHD-BSPC/carnation',
                        dependencies=TRUE, build_vignettes=TRUE)
```

### conda

An alternative way to get started with Carnation is through conda, which
handles all dependencies automatically:

``` bash
# Create environment outside the carnation directory
cd .. && conda env create -p env --file carnation/requirements-pinned.yaml
conda activate ./env
R
```

Then install the package with the `remotes` package. Here we set
`upgrade='never'` to make sure the conda-installed package versions
remain unchanged.

``` r

remotes::install_github('NICHD-BSPC/carnation@r4.3', upgrade='never')
```

Note:

- Conda packages for R \>= 4.6.0 may not be available yet causing
  installation using the default github branch to fail. To avoid this,
  use branch `r4.3` which pins R to a lower version.

## Getting Started

### Data Organization

Organize your data in a directory structure that Carnation can easily
navigate:

    /carnation/data/
      ├─ project1
      │  ├─ main.rds
      │  ├─ subset.rds
      │  └─ main-nooutlier.rds
      │
      └─ project2
         └─ default.rds

### First Run

Load the library and install required Python dependencies:

``` r

library(carnation)
install_carnation()  # Installs plotly and kaleido for PDF export
run_carnation()
```

For remote servers with SSH port forwarding:

``` r

run_carnation(options=list(port=12345, launch.browser=FALSE))
```

Then access Carnation at `http://127.0.0.1:12345`

## Documentation

Each module includes comprehensive help documentation accessible through
the help buttons throughout the interface. The documentation provides
detailed explanations of plot options, statistical methods, and
interpretation guidelines.

## Contributing

We welcome contributions to Carnation! Please feel free to submit issues
or pull requests to the GitHub repository.

## License

Carnation is available under the MIT license.

# Package index

## All functions

- [`add.set.column()`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/add.set.column.md)
  : Add set column to UpSet plot matrix

- [`add_metadata()`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/add_metadata.md)
  : Add metadata to counts data frame

- [`alluvialUI()`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/alluvialmod.md)
  [`alluvialServer()`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/alluvialmod.md)
  : Alluvial plot module

- [`check_user_access()`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/check_user_access.md)
  : Get data areas a user has access to

- [`cnetPlotUI()`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/cnetmod.md)
  [`cnetPlotServer()`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/cnetmod.md)
  : Cnetplot module

- [`create_access_yaml()`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/create_access_yaml.md)
  : Create access yaml

- [`patternPlotUI()`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/degmod.md)
  [`patternPlotServer()`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/degmod.md)
  : Pattern plot module

- [`degpatterns_dex`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/degpatterns_dex.md)
  :

  A `degPatterns` object for differentially expressed genes in the
  dexamethasone treatment comparison.

- [`dendrogramUI()`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/dendromod.md)
  [`dendrogramServer()`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/dendromod.md)
  : Dendrogram module

- [`distillPlotUI()`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/distillmod.md)
  [`distillPlotServer()`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/distillmod.md)
  : Distilled enrichment map module

- [`downloadButtonUI()`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/dlmod.md)
  [`downloadButtonServer()`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/dlmod.md)
  : Download button module

- [`dummy_genetonic()`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/dummy_genetonic.md)
  : Make dummy GeneTonic object

- [`enrichmapUI()`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/emapmod.md)
  [`enrichmapServer()`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/emapmod.md)
  : Enrichment map plot module

- [`enrich_to_genetonic()`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/enrich_to_genetonic.md)
  : Convert enrichResult to GeneTonic object

- [`eres_cell`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/eres_cell.md)
  :

  An `enrichResult` object for differentially expressed genes in the
  cell line comparison.

- [`eres_dex`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/eres_dex.md)
  :

  An `enrichResult` object for differentially expressed genes in the
  dexamethasone treatment comparison.

- [`format_genes()`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/format_genes.md)
  : format gene names to look pretty in table output

- [`fromList.with.names()`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/fromList.with.names.md)
  : Prepare list for UpSet plots, but include rownames

- [`enrichUI()`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/funenrichmod.md)
  [`enrichServer()`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/funenrichmod.md)
  : Functional enrichment module

- [`fuzzyPlotUI()`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/fuzzymod.md)
  [`fuzzyPlotServer()`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/fuzzymod.md)
  : Fuzzy enrichment map module

- [`genePlotUI()`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/geneplotmod.md)
  [`genePlotServer()`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/geneplotmod.md)
  : Gene plot module

- [`get_access_path()`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/get_access_path.md)
  : Get path to access yaml file

- [`get_config()`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/get_config.md)
  : Get config

- [`get_config_path()`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/get_config_path.md)
  : Get path to local config yaml file

- [`get_degplot()`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/get_degplot.md)
  : Plot a degPatterns object

- [`get_gene_counts()`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/get_gene_counts.md)
  : Get read counts for gene

- [`get_project_name_from_path()`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/get_project_name_from_path.md)
  : Get project name from path

- [`get_upset_table()`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/get_upset_table.md)
  : Generate upset plot table

- [`get_y_init()`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/get_y_init.md)
  : Get initial y-axis limits

- [`getcountplot()`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/getcountplot.md)
  : Create gene plot

- [`gs_radar()`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/gs_radar.md)
  : Radar plot

- [`heatmapUI()`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/heatmapmod.md)
  [`heatmapServer()`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/heatmapmod.md)
  : Heatmap module

- [`helpModal()`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/helpModal.md)
  : Help modal

- [`helpButtonUI()`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/helpmod.md)
  [`helpButtonServer()`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/helpmod.md)
  : Help button module

- [`horizonUI()`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/horizonmod.md)
  [`horizonServer()`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/horizonmod.md)
  : Horizon plot module

- [`in_admin_group()`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/in_admin_group.md)
  : is user is in admin group?

- [`init_local_config()`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/init_local_config.md)
  : Initialize local config

- [`install_carnation()`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/install_carnation.md)
  : Create carnation python environment

- [`is_site_admin()`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/is_site_admin.md)
  : is user an admin?

- [`is_valid_pattern_obj()`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/is_valid_pattern_obj.md)
  : Validate Pattern Analysis Object Schema

- [`loadDataUI()`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/loadmod.md)
  [`loadDataServer()`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/loadmod.md)
  : Load data module

- [`makeEnrichResult()`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/makeEnrichResult.md)
  : Make an enrichResult obj from a data frame

- [`make_example_carnation_object()`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/make_example_carnation_object.md)
  : Make example carnation object

- [`make_final_object()`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/make_final_object.md)
  : Make final object for internal use by the app

- [`maPlotUI()`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/maplotmod.md)
  [`maPlotServer()`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/maplotmod.md)
  : MA plot module

- [`materialize_carnation_object()`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/materialize_carnation_object.md)
  : Materialize expensive carnation object components

- [`metadataUI()`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/metamod.md)
  [`metadataServer()`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/metamod.md)
  : Metadata module

- [`my.summary()`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/my.summary.md)
  : Summarize DESeq2 results into a dataframe

- [`pcaPlotUI()`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/pcamod.md)
  [`pcaPlotServer()`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/pcamod.md)
  : PCA plot module

- [`plotMA.label()`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/plotMA.label.md)
  : Create a labeled MA plot

- [`plotMA.label_ly()`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/plotMA.label_ly.md)
  : Create an interactive labeled MA plot

- [`plotPCA.ly()`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/plotPCA.ly.md)
  : Plot an interactive PCA plot

- [`plotPCA.san()`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/plotPCA.san.md)
  : Adjustable PCA plot

- [`plotScatter.label()`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/plotScatter.label.md)
  : Plot a scatterplot to compare two contrasts

- [`plotScatter.label_ly()`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/plotScatter.label_ly.md)
  : Plot an interactive scatterplot to compare two contrasts

- [`radarUI()`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/radarmod.md)
  [`radarServer()`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/radarmod.md)
  : Radar plot module

- [`read_access_yaml()`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/read_access_yaml.md)
  : Read access yaml with user groups and data areas

- [`res_cell`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/res_cell.md)
  :

  A `DESeqResults` object testing the difference between two cell lines
  of smooth muscle cells

- [`res_dex`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/res_dex.md)
  :

  A `DESeqResults` object testing the effect of dexamethasone on smooth
  muscle cells

- [`run_carnation()`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/run_carnation.md)
  : Carnation

- [`save_access_yaml()`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/save_access_yaml.md)
  : Save access yaml to file

- [`saveUI()`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/savemod.md)
  [`saveServer()`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/savemod.md)
  : Save object module UI

- [`scatterPlotUI()`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/scattermod.md)
  [`scatterPlotServer()`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/scattermod.md)
  : Scatterplot module

- [`set_config()`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/set_config.md)
  : Set config

- [`settingsUI()`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/settingsmod.md)
  [`settingsServer()`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/settingsmod.md)
  : Settings module

- [`summarize_res_list()`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/summarize_res_list.md)
  : Combine everything in the results list into a single table

- [`sumovPlotUI()`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/sumovmod.md)
  [`sumovPlotServer()`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/sumovmod.md)
  : Summary overview plot module

- [`top.genes()`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/top.genes.md)
  : Get top DE genes by log2FoldChange or adjusted p-value

- [`upsetPlotUI()`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/upsetmod.md)
  [`upsetPlotServer()`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/upsetmod.md)
  : Upset plot module

- [`validate_carnation_object()`](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/reference/validate_carnation_object.md)
  : Validate a carnation object

# Articles

### All vignettes

- [carnation - airway
  tutorial](https://nichd-bspc.github.io/carnation/articles/carnation.md):
